name: Chad
description: 1,000 weighted box step-ups in a weight vest, completed as 250 trips up and down — one of the longest single-movement volume tests in Games history.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2024/5 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; same core movement as the Hero WOD Chad1000x, but this is the official 2024 Games version with a 67-minute cap and vest load
